name: Southeast Asian Vegetables & Noodles
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Uncooked vermicelli, broken into 2-inch pieces (1 cup)
1 package (1-lb.) Green Giant American Mixtures Frozen Carrots, Green Beans, and Cauliflower OR Frozen Broccoli, Cauliflower, Sugar Snap Peas, and Red Peppers, thawed
1 tsp Finely chopped seeded jalapeno chile or 1/4 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes
2 tbsp Dry sherry or apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the vermicelli according to package instructions until al dente.
2. In a large skillet, heat sesame oil over medium heat.
3. Add garlic and gingerroot, sautéing for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
4. Add the thawed vegetables, stirring to coat in the oil.
5. Season with salt and crushed red pepper flakes (or red pepper flakes), mixing well.
6. Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
7. Stir in the dry sherry or apple juice, ensuring all ingredients are evenly distributed.
8. Cover the skillet and cook for 10-15 minutes, allowing flavors to meld and vegetables to soften.
9. Turn off heat when ready, and serve hot with additional toppings if desired.
